zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joanna Trafford於1358年出生在英國藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾時，她的父親Sir Henry de Trafford Kt35歲，母親Margaret Ince31歲。她於1378年與John Boothe of Barton, Esq.在英國藍卡爾巴頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1405年在她的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾瓦爾梅斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joanna Trafford于1358年出生在英国藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾时，她的父亲Sir Henry de Trafford Kt35岁，母亲Margaret Ince31岁。她于1378年与John Boothe of Barton, Esq.在英国藍卡爾巴頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1405年在她的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾瓦爾梅斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Trafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Trafford (Lancashire), Trafford in Chipping Warden (Northamptonshire), and Bridge, Mickle, and Wimbolds Trafford (Cheshire). The Northamptonshire placename probably derives from Old English træppe ‘trap’ + ford ‘ford’. The Cheshire placenames derive from Old English trōg ‘trough’ + ford. The Lancashire placename is a development of Stretford (Lancashire); most cases of the surname probably derive from this place. Early members of the de Trafford family, recorded here from the 13th century, were also recorded in medieval documents as de Stratford(e). Both the surname and the placename lost the initial S-. The manor of Trafford was carved out of Stretford township, and perhaps because its manor house was located at some distance from Stretford village, Trafford was adopted for the new settlement from an early date. See also Stratford .

variants.name: Stratford
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Stratford, for example in Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire, Middlesex, Northamptonshire, Suffolk, Warwickshire, and Wiltshire, from Old English strǣt ‘Roman road’ (see Street ) + ford ‘ford’.

habitational name principally from Strafford Sands (now lost) in Mexborough (Yorkshire), presumed to be the ancient meeting-place of Strafforth Wapentake, and deriving from the same source as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joanna Trafford was born in 1358, in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Henry de Trafford Kt, was 35 and her mother, Margaret Ince, was 31. She married John Boothe of Barton, Esq. in 1378, in Barton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1405, in her hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in Walmersley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joanna Trafford est née en 1358, à Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry de Trafford Kt, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Ince, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John Boothe of Barton, Esq. en 1378, à Barton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1405, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Walmersley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joanna Trafford 1358 in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry de Trafford Kt 35 und ihre Mutter Margaret Ince 31. Sie hat 1378 in Barton, Lancashire, England John Boothe of Barton, Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1405 im Alter von 47 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Walmersley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joanna Trafford è nata il nel 1358 nel Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Henry de Trafford Kt, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Margaret Ince, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato John Boothe of Barton, Esq. nel 1378, nel Barton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1405, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Walmersley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Traffordが1358年にイギリスランカシュアイアトラフォード マノーで生まれた時，父Sir Henry de Trafford Ktは35歳，母Margaret Inceは31歳であった。1378年にイギリスランカシュアイアバートンでJohn Boothe of Barton, Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1405年に故郷で47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワルメルスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Trafford(이)가 1358년 영국 랭카실르 트래퍼드 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry de Trafford Kt(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Ince(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1378년 영국 랭카실르 바턴에서 John Boothe of Barton, Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1405년 그녀의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 월머슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joanna Trafford nasceu em 1358, em Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry de Trafford Kt, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Ince, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com John Boothe of Barton, Esq. em 1378, em Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1405, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Walmersley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joanna Trafford родилась в 1358 г. в местности траффорд манор, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry de Trafford Kt было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Ince, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Boothe of Barton, Esq. в 1378 г. в местности бартон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1405 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности валмирсли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joanna Trafford nació en 1358, en Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry de Trafford Kt, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret Ince, tenía 31 años. Se casó con John Boothe of Barton, Esq. en 1378, en Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1405, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Walmersley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
